ddt:Target.Name: N_P13A_HVAC(auto)_UDS_D5_20190108
ddt:Target.email: OKUTSU, NATSUMI <okutsu-na@mail.nissan.co.jp>; DANG wei <wei-dang@mail.nissan.co.jp>; SHIOTA shingo <shiota-shingo@mail.nissan.co.jp>; HOSHINO makoto <hoshinom@mail.nissan.co.jp>
ddt:Target.Description:
[1]2017/10/31 Nissan XX6 N.Okutsu Changed ReadDTC's 3rd byte to "AF".
[N] 2017/07/17 Nissan XX6 C.Kudo Initial Creation.

Item.Text: FM (Frequency Modulated) / PWM (Pulse Width Modulated) Failures
Engine stopped by normal system request(2h)
Engine stopped by other cause OR Engine stopped by normal system request(3h)
Engine stopped by normal driver request(4h)

Data.Name: DTCFormatIdentifier
Data.Comment: DTC format - Renault/Nissan use value 0 (3 bytes DTC)
